entry.title: New: RES26-027 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
GRANTING A SPECIAL MANAGEMENT AREA MAJOR PERMIT TO ALLOW FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A NEW ONE-STORY, SINGLE-UNIT DWELLING, DETACHED COVERED CABANA, TWO-CAR OPEN PARKING AREA, IN-GROUND SWIMMING POOL AND WATER FEATURE, AND AT-GRADE SPA, IN KĀHALA, OʻAHU.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
